Frequently Asked Questions

How long does shipping take?

Standard shipping takes 3-5 business days. Express shipping is available for faster delivery.

What is your return policy?

We offer a 30-day return policy for unused items in original packaging.

Do you ship internationally?

Currently, we ship to all major cities in India. International shipping coming soon!

Naaz Book Depot

Publishing the Light of Knowledge since 1967. Specialized in authentic Islamic literature, Qur'an, and premium fragrances serving the global Muslim community.
